signInSuccess: We sent you a login link. Be sure to check your spam too.
workspaceNotFound: The requested workspace could not be found.
generalError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
pendingInvitations: Invitation already exists and is pending
accountDeleteMessage: Your account has been successfully deleted
accountDeleteDescription: We're sorry to see you go. You will be redirected to the sign-in page shortly. If you change your mind, you're always welcome to create a new account.
onboardingSkipDescription: You will be redirected to your Dashboard shortly.
